purpose: Heading text that labels a page, section, or grouped content. Title carries semantic heading level (H1-H6) which screen readers use for navigation; visual size is determined by the level variant.
whenToUse: Page-level H1 — exactly one per page, inside DynamicPageTitle.slots.heading
Section H2 — for major sections of an Object Page or detail screen
Subsection H3-H4 — for grouped content within a section
Toolbar title — when an OverflowToolbar needs a left-aligned descriptive label (e.g. 'Artifacts (47)')
Panel header — when a Panel needs an accessible heading
whenNotToUse: As body text or paragraphs — use Text or Label instead
As interactive control labels — use Label and associate via labelFor
As status messages or hints — use MessageStrip or Text
Inside table cells — use plain text with appropriate SAP text style binding
doRules: Use exactly one H1 per page (page title in DynamicPageTitle)
Use H2 for major sections, H3 for subsections; do NOT skip levels (H1→H3 breaks screen reader navigation)
Keep titles short — 1 line where possible, max 2 lines on wrap
Bind text color to sapTitleColor for page/section, sapList_TextColor for toolbar context
Use the Level/TitleStyle variant — don't hardcode font size
dontRules: Do not skip heading levels (H1→H3 breaks accessibility tree)
Do not hardcode color — bind to a sapTitle*/sapList_TextColor variable
Do not use Title for non-heading content (status, hints, interactive labels)
Do not repeat the same title text multiple times at the same level in a single section
Do not use ALL CAPS — relies on visual style not text content

layoutGuidance.placement: Top of the content area or section. Page H1 lives inside DynamicPageTitle.slots.heading.
layoutGuidance.sizing: H1 = 28px Bold, H2 = 24px, H3 = 20px, H4 = 18px (page title), H5 = 16px, H6 = 14px.
layoutGuidance.spacing: Match SAP heading rhythm: 16px below H1; 12px below H2; 8px below H3.
layoutGuidance.alignment: Left-aligned to content edge. Page title aligns with first content column.

contentGuidance.labelLength: Page title: 1-5 words. Section: 1-3 words. Toolbar title: 1-3 words plus optional count e.g. 'Artifacts (47)'.
contentRules: Use sentence case unless brand requires title case
Avoid punctuation at the end (period, colon)
For counts, parenthesize: 'Artifacts (47)' not 'Artifacts: 47' or '47 Artifacts'

responsiveBehavior.XL: Full size at H1 28px / H2 24px / etc.
responsiveBehavior.M: Page H1 may scale to 24px on dense mobile-tablet hybrid layouts.
responsiveBehavior.S: Page H1 scales to 20px; sub-headings may be reduced one step.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to <h1>-<h6> HTML element via Level/TitleStyle variant. Screen readers expose heading level for navigation.
accessibilityGuidance.contrast: Title text contrast ≥ 4.5:1 normal (≥ 3:1 large text ≥ 18.67px bold per WCAG AA).
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Not interactive (heading is non-interactive). Skip-to-heading shortcuts (H key in screen readers) jump between Title elements.

exceptions: The SAP Figma library does not ship a standalone Title instance — the plugin aliases Title to the SAP Label instance for rendered output, OR uses a native text node bound to SAP text style + color variables.
Native text rendering is acceptable as long as the fill is bound to a SAP variable (sapTitleColor or sapList_TextColor).
